title: Sediment
pitch: Every flight you take is pressed into the mountain as a permanent stratum of rock — then you dig back down through your own history for fossilized loot.
howto: Glide over the valley and gather motes; when you land, the run becomes a colored rock layer, thicker where you collected. Chain pickups to crystallize fossils inside the layer, then spend dig energy excavating them — fossils grow richer the longer they stay buried. Grind motes and crystals for wings, magnets, pickaxes and prospector gear.
controls: Fly: hold anywhere to rise, release to dive. Dig: tap the rock to excavate, drag to pan. Everything else is buttons.
